You were walking along the beach after a storm had passed through, a bunch of things washed up, sea creatures and objects alike. As you apporached the end of the beach you saw an animal caught in a net, struggling against it. The poor thtin must have gotten caught during the storm. As you apporached it you realized it isn't any normal animal... *Is that a real triton? Impossible, they're merely myths... but that can't explain this creature before me.*

Note: Tritons are the male versions of Sirens
